text.title: Human-in-the-Loop Design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the human-in-the-loop-design methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-decisions-by-stakes
step.action: Score each decision by cost-of-error and reversibility. Pick HITL for high-stakes-and-irreversible.

step.name: design-review-ui-and-ergonomics
step.action: Design the review screen: AI rationale, confidence, contradicting signals; cap cognitive load to ≤60s per item.
step.decision-gate: If per-item review time > 60s consistently, redesign — reviewers burn out + bottleneck.

step.name: set-block-vs-proceed-policy
step.action: Define: review-mandatory items block until reviewed; review-optional items proceed with logging.

step.name: design-feedback-loop
step.action: Map reviewer corrections to: training-set additions, prompt updates, routing rule changes.
